decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells in order to quickly deplete their resources and finish them off. Using efficient black creatures like Nantuko Shade and Hypnotic Specter, along with removal spells like Diabolic Edict and Smother, the deck aims to apply pressure early and never let up. With cards like Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan and ways to generate mana quickly like Dark Ritual, this mono black aggro deck aims to control the game and come out on top through relentless aggression.

The deck aims to quickly get out a Phyrexian Dreadnought while using counterspells and Stifle effects to protect it. It can also dig for combo pieces with card draw spells like Opt and Impulse. The inclusion of Tsabo's Web and Powder Keg provides additional disruption against specific strategies. Overall, the deck focuses on assembling the Stiflenought combo efficiently while disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells and other control elements.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of aggressive goblin creatures, utilizing cards such as Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to quickly bring them onto the battlefield. Cards like Goblin Warchief and Goblin King provide additional boosts to the goblin army, while Gempalm Incinerator can clear the way for attacks. Wasteland and Rishadan Port disrupt the opponent's land base, while Siege-Gang Commander provides extra reach with its ability to create Goblin tokens. Overall, this deck aims to quickly deploy a strong board presence and dominate the battlefield.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought with Stifle in order to create a powerful threat and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck contains a mix of countermagic, cantrips, and card filtering to help find the combo pieces efficiently. By using Stifle to counteract the Dreadnought's drawback, this deck aims to control the game and outpace the opponent through a quick and decisive combo finish. The inclusion of additional control elements like Daze and Counterspell also helps protect the combo and keep the opponent off balance.

The main concept of this Aggro Goblins deck is to flood the board with cheap and efficient Goblin creatures, utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to search for key pieces like Goblin Warchief and Goblin Piledriver. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its aggressive creatures and take advantage of cards like Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander for additional damage and board control. The inclusion of cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port also disrupt opponents' mana base, allowing the Goblins to quickly close out games with their fast and efficient attacks.

This deck is focused on quickly overwhelming opponents with a swarm of aggressive Goblin creatures. By utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey to put powerful Goblins onto the battlefield early, combined with Goblin Matron and Ringleader to search for more threats, the deck aims to maintain a steady stream of pressure. Cards like Goblin Warchief and Siege-Gang Commander provide additional support and damage output, while cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland disrupt opponent's mana base. With a mix of efficient creatures and disruptive spells, this deck aims to win quickly and decisively.

The deck revolves around quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Verdant Force and Akroma, Angel of Wrath, then using spells like Reanimate and Exhume to bring them back onto the battlefield for a powerful combo. This is supported by disruption and protection cards like Unmask and Cabal Therapy, as well as mana acceleration from Dark Ritual. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with high-value creatures early in the game and secure a victory before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly ramp up land and creature destruction while simultaneously building up a board presence with aggressive creatures like Terravore and Nimble Mongoose. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's resources and overwhelm them with efficient threats, utilizing cards like Cataclysm and Wasteland to control the battlefield. With a mixture of land destruction, creature recursion, and removal spells, this deck seeks to apply constant pressure and maintain control throughout the game.

The deck focuses on using cards like Survival of the Fittest and Hermit Druid to quickly assemble the combo pieces needed to win the game. By using cards like Unearth and Animate Dead, the deck can recur key creatures like Karmic Guide and Phyrexian Devourer. With the right setup, the deck can create a powerful board state with cards like Triskelion and Akroma, Angel of Wrath to finish off the opponent. The key strategy involves efficiently using the graveyard and manipulating the deck to set up game-winning combos.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Tinker and Fling to deal a large amount of damage to the opponent in a single turn. The deck includes cards like City of Traitors, Mind Stone, and Lotus Petal to ramp up mana quickly, while also using cards like Tsabo's Web and Defense Grid to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By sacrificing Phyrexian Devourer to Altar of Dementia and then using Tinker to find Fling, the deck aims to win the game in a powerful and unexpected way.

The main concept of this Landstill Control deck is to control the game through counterspells, removal spells, and land denial while maintaining card advantage through cards like Fact or Fiction and Standstill. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by efficiently dealing with threats and disrupting their game plan, eventually overwhelming them with powerful spells like Wrath of God and Decree of Justice. By staying ahead on resources and leveraging its control elements, this deck aims to outmaneuver and outlast its opponents in a long game.

The deck focuses on using burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate to control the board while keeping the opponent's hand size low with cards like Black Vise and Ensnaring Bridge. Sulfuric Vortex helps to chip away at the opponent's life total, while cards like Grim Lavamancer and Cursed Scroll provide additional direct damage. Seal of Fire and Fireblast offer additional removal and reach, allowing the player to maintain control of the game and ultimately finish off the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with a swarm of aggressive goblin creatures. By utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey to cheat in powerful goblins early on and utilizing Goblin Warchief to reduce their mana cost, the deck aims to quickly establish a board presence and deal damage fast. Cards like Goblin Piledriver and Goblin Ringleader provide additional power and card advantage, while removal spells like Naturalize and Gempalm Incinerator help to deal with any threats from the opponent. The deck also includes some utility cards like Goblin Matron and Siege-Gang Commander to provide additional support and options.

This deck relies on an aggressive strategy using Goblins to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Key cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Warchief help you get your creatures out faster, while Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander provide removal and additional damage. The deck also includes mana disruption with cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to slow down the opponent. With a mix of creature swarm, removal, and disruption, this deck aims to win the game quickly and efficiently.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Replenish card to bring back powerful enchantments like Parallax Wave and Opalescence from the graveyard. This combo creates a powerful board state by turning those enchantments into creatures and controlling the battlefield. The deck also includes control elements like Mana Leak and Seal of Cleansing to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Attunement and Intuition help to filter through the deck and find key combo pieces. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a strong board presence and control the game through powerful enchantments.

This deck focuses on using land destruction spells like Stone Rain and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base and control the tempo of the game. It also includes burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate to deal damage to creatures or the opponent directly. The deck utilizes creatures like Grim Lavamancer and Mogg Fanatic for additional damage and board control. The key strategy is to keep the opponent's resources limited while applying pressure with small creatures and burn spells to secure a win through attrition.
